query:
SELECT 
  ms.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  a.programId,
  p.name AS empresa_nome,
  COUNT(*) AS total_sessoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.presence = 'presente' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.presence = 'ausente' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ausentes,
  SUM(ms.isAssessment) AS assessments
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE ms.sessionDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ms.sessionDate <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY ms.consultorId, c.name, a.programId, p.name
ORDER BY c.name, p.name;

SELECT 
  ms.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  a.programId,
  p.name AS empresa_nome,
  COUNT(*) AS total_sessoes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.presence = 'presente' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ms.presence = 'ausente' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ausentes,
  SUM(ms.isAssessment) AS assessments
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE ms.sessionDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ms.sessionDate <= '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY ms.consultorId, c.name, a.programId, p.name
ORDER BY c.name, p.name;
